info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_Transaction Processing API
info.description: The Transaction Processing API enables businesses to initiate and manage transactions efficiently. It allows users to submit transaction requests, including payment details and associated metadata, for processing. This API is designed for developers looking to integrate financial operations into their applications, enabling seamless transaction handling for customers. Typical consumers include e-commerce platforms, financial services, and any application that requires transaction capabilities.

post.description: This endpoint allows the user to create a new transaction in the system by providing the necessary transaction details. Successful creation will return the transaction information.

requestBody.description: The request body for creating a new transaction. This should include all required fields for processing the transaction according to the defined schema.

200.description: Request completed successfully, returning the created transaction details.

500.description: An unexpected error occurred on the server while processing the request.

404.description: The requested resource could not be found.

customerId.description: Identifier for the customer associated with the transaction.

accountNumber.description: The account number involved in the transaction.

transactionType.description: Type of the transaction, e.g., deposit, withdrawal.

amount.description: The amount of money involved in the transaction.

currency.description: Currency type for the transaction amount (e.g., USD, EUR).

status.description: Current status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending).

message.description: Additional message or information regarding the transaction.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: Response schema for successful transaction creation.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.title: Error Response for Transaction Operation

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates whether the operation was successful or not.

error.description: The error code associated with the error.

message.description: A descriptive message about the error.
message.example: Unable to process financial transaction due to internal service failure.

path.description: The path of the request that led to the error.

trace.description: A traceable identifier for tracking the error.

suggestion.description: A suggestion on how to correct the issue.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: Schema representing the structure of a 500 error response for transaction operations.

example.message: Unable to process financial transaction due to internal service failure.

details.message: Payment gateway timeout while processing transaction request.

example.suggestion: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Error.title: Error Details

accountNumber.description: The account number related to the error.

errorCode.description: A specific error code associated with the issue.

message.description: A detailed message related to the error.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Error.description: Contains additional details about the error that occurred.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.title: Transaction Request Body

customerId.description: Unique identifier for the customer initiating the transaction.

accountNumber.description: Account number from which the transaction will be made.

transactionType.description: Type of the transaction (e.g., debit, credit).

amount.description: Amount of money to be transferred in the transaction.

currency.description: Currency code (e.g., USD, EUR) for the transaction amount.

beneficiaryAccount.description: Account number of the beneficiary receiving the funds.

transactionDate.description: Date when the transaction is initiated, in ISO format.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: Schema representing the request body for creating a transaction operation.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.title: Error Response for POST Transactions

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates whether the status of the operation was successful.

error.description: A short description of the error.

message.description: A detailed message describing the error.
message.example: Source account details not found for transaction processing.

path.description: The path of the request that resulted in the error.

trace.description: A trace of the error for debugging purposes.

details.description: Detailed error information related to the specific request.

suggestion.description: A suggestion on how the user can resolve the error.
suggestion.example: Verify account details and retry the transaction.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: This schema represents the structure of an error response returned when a POST request to the transactions endpoint results in a 404 error.

example.message: Source account details not found for transaction processing.

details.message: No active account exists for the provided account number.

example.suggestion: Verify account details and retry the transaction.

environment.name: environment
environment.description: Environment used to select the workflow branch.

serviceCategory.name: serviceCategory
serviceCategory.description: Service category used to select the workflow branch.
